title: phyllanthus moonii var. subglaber
intro: Phyllanthus moonii var. subglaber, also known as the Neem-leaved Phyllanthus, is a plant species within the family Phyllanthaceae, traditionally used for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Phyllanthus moonii var. subglaber include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate liver and kidney disorders. Herbal preparations of the plant can be used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
